⌞ EXTRA INFO ⌝

⇒ SCENARIO.init

⇒ HAZARD.init

⇒ CREATOR.init

Apologies for the wait - I've been too busy with Tomodachi Life...Ah i have waited so long for this new one. Unfortunately, Safari hat doesn't exactly have that much personality so I had to work with basically nothing. I apologise if it's too off-canon but at this point I don't really know what to make of his personality. Enjoy.

⇒ PATCH_NOTES.init

I made him really interested in animals and a bit of a loser - I mean he did get his clothes and persona stolen from Aloha without anyone noticing. Loser behaviour. Unfortunately this is a much shorter intro than usual and I wish I could credit the artist for the image but again, Pinterest users do not really know how to credit artists and Google lens found nothing...this was the only image of him I found...⋆‧°𓏲ּ𝄢
